method: Prices from Inceptron's own public OpenAI-compatible catalog API https://api.inceptron.io/v1/models (pricing.prompt / pricing.completion, USD per token x 1e6); cross-checked against OpenRouter provider endpoint data (provider_name=='Inceptron'). Both sources agree on the 3-model catalog and on all prices (in/out).

models.notes: fp8 quant, 202K context. Cache read $0.26/1M. Inceptron model id zai-org/GLM-5.1-FP8. Matches OpenRouter Inceptron endpoint (in 1.40 / out 4.40).

int4 quant, 262K context, multimodal (text+image input). Cache read $0.20/1M. Inceptron model id moonshotai/Kimi-K2.6. Input price $0.67/1M per api.inceptron.io and OpenRouter (was $0.68 on 2026-06-18 prior snapshot). Output $3.50/1M everywhere.
fp8 quant, 196K context. Cache read $0.05/1M. Inceptron model id MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M2.5. Matches OpenRouter Inceptron endpoint (in 0.15 / out 0.90).
